/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o -o game  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 -lGL
